rawPrompt: Create a baseline screenshot library for the surface library source. The plan must turn the request into acceptance-ready work for the built-in surface library. The captured evidence should reflect dark mode during verification. It should publish a reviewable evidence package for GitHub and documentation stakeholders. It needs to leave a visible business process gate for baseline review. Do this so that product and engineering leads can inspect the baseline without reading implementation details.

codeSurface.label: Surface Library
codeSurface.rationale: The prompt points to surface-library behavior inside intent-poc-app.

alternatives.label: Intent Studio
alternatives.reason: The library request may also touch the Studio shell if the prompt is using Studio language loosely.

businessIntent.statement: Create a baseline screenshot library for the surface library source. The plan must turn the request into acceptance-ready work for the built-in surface library. The captured evidence should reflect dark mode during verification. It should publish a reviewable evidence package for GitHub and documentation stakeholders. It needs to leave a visible business process gate for baseline review. Do this so that product and engineering leads can inspect the baseline without reading implementation details.
businessIntent.desiredOutcome: Establish a baseline screenshot library for the surface library, ensuring dark mode verification and a reviewable evidence package for stakeholders.

acceptanceCriteria.description: All surface library components are captured in dark mode.
A reviewable evidence package is generated for GitHub and documentation stakeholders.
A business process gate is established for baseline review.
Product and engineering leads can inspect the baseline without reading implementation details.

scenarios.title: Capture dark mode baseline for surface library
scenarios.goal: Generate visual evidence for all library components in dark mode.
given: The intent-poc-app is configured with dark mode support.
The dark mode state is activated via the 'dark=true' query parameter.
when: The Playwright test suite iterates through all defined captures in the surface library.
Each capture is rendered in the dark theme.
then: A screenshot for each component is saved to the evidence directory.
The screenshots are verified against the dark mode theme tokens.

scenarios.title: Publish evidence package for stakeholder review
scenarios.goal: Package and expose the baseline screenshots for non-technical review.
given: The screenshot capture process has completed successfully.
A directory of baseline images exists.
when: The evidence package is compiled into a reviewable format.
The package is pushed to the designated documentation repository.
then: Stakeholders can access the baseline screenshots via the documentation site.
A pull request is opened to serve as the business process gate for baseline approval.

workItems.title: Capture and Publish Surface Library Dark Mode Baseline
workItems.description: Generate a comprehensive visual baseline for all surface library components in dark mode and package them for stakeholder review.
workItems.userVisibleOutcome: A complete set of dark-mode screenshots for all library components, published to the documentation site with a pull request for baseline approval.
workItems.verification: Visual regression suite execution with dark mode query parameter enabled, followed by automated packaging of artifacts.

specs.testName: Capture dark mode baseline for all components

checkpoints.label: Navigate to library index in dark mode
checkpoints.assertion: The library index is loaded with dark mode enabled.

requiredUiStates.label: Theme mode
requiredUiStates.description: The demo app supports light and dark theme states that materially change contrast, tokens, and screenshot evidence.

notes: The demo app now honors the dark query parameter across Studio and library routes for deterministic verification.
The library surface toggle remains available for manual verification flows.
Intent Studio keeps an explicit toggle for interactive review during manual sessions.
Stateful UI bugs should declare and verify the requested UI state before screenshot evidence is trusted.
Prefer reusable state activation contracts over prompt-specific routing or one-off checkpoint logic.
Theme-sensitive UI bugs require paired light-mode and dark-mode screenshot evidence; do not accept a dark-mode-only capture set.
Verify the active theme state before trusting screenshot comparisons.
Prefer the shared dark query parameter during generated verification so screenshots start in the requested theme.
Dark-theme verification should keep a light-mode reference screenshot alongside the dark-mode target evidence.
requiredUiStates.reason: Prompt requests the Theme mode UI state with value "dark".

destinations.label: Controller artifacts
destinations.reason: Local evidence bundles are always written by the controller.
details: Stores plan, manifests, logs, captures, and summaries on disk.

destinations.label: Source workspace publication
destinations.reason: Workspace publishing is disabled until artifacts.storageMode is set to 'both'.
details: Useful when evidence should live beside the source repository.

destinations.label: GitHub workflow
destinations.reason: The prompt references GitHub-facing workflow, but there is no GitHub destination publisher yet.
details: Future publisher: PR comments, check runs, or issue updates.

destinations.label: Documentation space
destinations.reason: The prompt references documentation outputs, but there is no docs publisher yet.
details: Future publisher: markdown docs, wiki pages, or knowledge-base updates.

destinations.label: Business process controls
destinations.reason: The prompt references process-level rollout, which should become an explicit destination in the system.
details: Future publisher: approval gates, process checklists, or automation hooks.

tools.label: BDD planning
tools.reason: The system converts the raw prompt into reviewable acceptance criteria and scenarios during the full reviewed plan pass.
details: Deterministic by default, with optional Gemini refinement when configured.

tools.label: Playwright TDD generation
tools.reason: Applicable sources now produce Playwright-first executable test plans and checkpoint screenshots.
details: Generated specs are intended for checked-in repo storage with overwrite semantics.

tools.label: Visual verification
tools.reason: Applicable sources currently expose visual checkpoints and capture definitions.
details: Playwright screenshots remain one execution tool rather than the top-level product model.

tools.label: Environment deployment
tools.reason: A generic local or Kubernetes deployment stage is planned but not yet wired into the runner.
details: This will become the shared path for local, minikube, and k3s-backed execution.

tools.label: Implementation loop
tools.reason: The runner can execute bounded implementation attempts against the prepared source workspace.
details: QA failures can feed directly back into the next bounded implementation attempt.

tools.label: QA verification
tools.reason: The runner can now execute a bounded QA bundle before evidence capture completes the lane.
details: The default QA bundle runs typecheck, the deterministic code test suite, and generated Playwright specs when a source enables them.

tools.label: Evidence reporting
tools.reason: Every run produces summaries and machine-readable manifests.
details: Reports become distribution inputs for downstream review and publishing surfaces.
